Terms & Conditions

Effective Date: March 24, 2026

IMPORTANT LEGAL NOTICE: TaxSense is an independent financial estimation tool and is not affiliated with HM Revenue & Customs (HMRC) or any other government entity. All figures, tax calculations, and projections provided are informational estimates only based on currently available tax guidelines. They do not constitute professional financial, legal, or tax advice.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By downloading, accessing, or using the TaxSense mobile application ("the App") and associated services provided by TaxSense Accountants Limited ("we", "us", "our"), you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions ("Terms"), which include an End User License Agreement (EULA). If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access or use our services.

2. Disclaimer of Financial and Tax Advice

The App is designed to provide estimates and track financial entries based on current UK tax rates, national insurance thresholds, and algorithmic assumptions. Due to the complex nature of tax legislation, TaxSense makes no warranties or representations regarding the absolute precision or suitability of these calculations for your unique financial circumstances.

  • You acknowledge that TaxSense is not substituting for a certified accountant, tax advisor, or legal counsel.
  • Never use the App's projections as the sole basis for submitting self-assessment tax returns, making employment decisions, or reporting to HMRC.
  • We expressly disclaim liability for any underpayment or overpayment of tax, financial penalties, or compliance issues arising from reliance on Data within the App. All final verifications must be performed by a qualified professional.

3. License Grant and Intellectual Property

Subject to your compliance with these Terms, we grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to download, install, and use the App for your personal, non-commercial purposes on a mobile device that you own or control. We retain all rights, title, and interest in and to the App, including all source code, design, features, functionality, graphics, and underlying algorithms.

4. Subscriptions and Auto-Renewing Payments

Certain premium features of TaxSense ("TaxSense Pro", "Ultimate Power Pack") are available via subscription. By opting for a premium subscription, you agree to the following billing terms compliant with Apple App Store policies:

  • Payment: Payment will be charged to your Apple ID / iTunes Account at the confirmation of purchase.
  • Auto-Renewal: Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
  • Renewal Charges: Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period, identifying the cost of the renewal based on your selected tier.
  • Management: You can manage your subscriptions and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to your App Store Account Settings after purchase.
  • Refunds: All purchases are handled by Apple. Any requests for refunds must be directed to Apple App Store customer service. We cannot directly issue refunds for iOS purchases.
  • Cancellation: If you cancel a subscription, you will retain access to the premium features until the end of your billing period.

5. User Data and Account Security

TaxSense utilizes a primarily local-first data architecture. Your financial entries (such as shifts, overtime, salaries, and expenses) remain encrypted on your device and are not automatically transmitted to our servers unless you explicitly opt-in to Cloud Sync.

  • If you utilize Cloud Sync, your data is securely stored via Firebase. You remain the sole owner of your data.
  • You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.
  • Please refer to our Privacy Policy for detailed information on data collection, processing, and retention.

6. Artificial Intelligence (AI) Features

The App features an AI Assistant powered by integrations with the Google Gemini API.

  • Queries submitted to the AI Assistant may be sent to third-party endpoints to generate responses.
  • AI responses are algorithmically generated and may contain inaccuracies. You agree to independently verify any tax or financial guidance suggested by the AI before acting.
  • You agree not to submit extremely sensitive personal identification (such as your full National Insurance Number or bank account details) into the AI chat prompt, as general chat queries do not require such information to function.

7. Acceptable Use Policy

When using the App, you agree not to: (a) decompile, reverse engineer, disassemble, or attempt to derive the source code of the App; (b) use the App for any illegal or fraudulent activities; (c) attempt to exploit any systemic vulnerabilities in the application; or (d) interfere with the security or operation of the App's servers and networks.

8. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law in the United Kingdom, TaxSense Accountants Limited shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from (i) your access to or use of or inability to access or use the App; (ii) any conduct or content of any third party on the App; or (iii) unauthorized access, use, or alteration of your transmissions or content.

9. Revisions and Modifications to the App

We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the App or any feature (including subscription tiers) with or without notice. We will not be liable to you or any third party if we exercise such rights. Pricing for new subscriptions may change at any time, but price increases will not affect active subscriptions without giving you prior notice and an opportunity to accept or decline the change in accordance with Apple's policies.

10. Governing Law

These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising out of these Terms will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.

11. Contact Information

If you have any questions, concerns, or feedback regarding these Terms & Conditions, please do not hesitate to reach out to us:

Email: info@taxsense.app
